hypothesis: Fine-tuning the pre-trained eSEN potential in an on-the-fly active-learning SSNEB loop that selectively adds DFT labels for images with the largest stress errors and optimizes a stress-weighted loss will reduce the number of VASP-restart SSNEB iterations by at least 50% and yield energy barriers within 0.05 eV of VASP-only results for polymorphic transitions in CsPbI3, MAPbI3, and FAPbI3.
